concepts.label: Autopoiesis
concepts.definition_full: systems exhibiting Droste-like properties, where the system itself is mirrored within its own structure and behavior.
concepts.source_evidence: notes: Extracted using pattern: self-(?:organizing|producing|maintaining)\s+(.{10,200}) | source: D:\149\research-mining\archive\conversation_export.json | extraction_date: 2025-09-14T16:22:25.239427

concepts.label: Recursion
concepts.definition_full: fundamental, yet it is never actually experienced—it is simply implied by the structure of reality.
